summary: Verified zoom level indicator feature and related functionality. All key features working: zoom level indicator shows between +/- buttons (e.g., '17'), updates correctly when clicking zoom in/out buttons, route calculation works with Navigation HUD displaying distance/instruction, route overlay signs (speed limit, highway shields) visible, blue navigation chevron user icon present, and Settings truck profile edit modal works correctly (regression test passed).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Zoom level indicator at MapControls.tsx lines 220-223 with data-testid='zoom-level-indicator'
VERIFIED: currentZoom state in NavigationView.tsx line 290, passed to MapControls at line 5895
VERIFIED: zoomend event listener at NavigationView.tsx line 686 updates currentZoom state
VERIFIED: userPreferredZoomRef tracks user's manual zoom level (line 291)
VERIFIED: Auto-zoom logic at lines 2135-2161 - zooms in +2 levels at <=0.3mi (0.4mi for complex maneuvers), zooms back at >0.6mi
VERIFIED: Auto-zoom state reset in clearRoute at line 2511
VERIFIED: Zoom in button has data-testid='zoom-in-btn' at line 216
VERIFIED: Zoom out button has data-testid='zoom-out-btn' at line 231

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Zoom level indicator feature verified. The indicator shows between + and - zoom buttons on the right side map controls panel. It displays the current zoom level as a number (e.g., '17') and updates reactively when zooming. Auto-zoom for maneuvers cannot be easily tested without real GPS movement, but code implementation verified. Route from Council Bluffs to Denver shows 25 highway shields, 4 exit signs, 4 speed limit signs.

zoom_level_indicator.details: Zoom level indicator found with data-testid='zoom-level-indicator', shows value '17' initially, updates correctly when clicking zoom in/out buttons. Progression tested: 13 -> 14 -> 15 -> 16 (zoom in), 16 -> 15 -> 14 -> 13 -> 12 -> 11 (zoom out)

zoom_in_button.details: Zoom in button found with data-testid='zoom-in-btn', clicking increases zoom level and updates indicator

zoom_out_button.details: Zoom out button found with data-testid='zoom-out-btn', clicking decreases zoom level and updates indicator

navigation_hud.details: HUD displays at top with '0.2 MI' distance, 'HEAD TOWARD S 8TH ST ON W BROADWAY. GO FOR 1312 FT.' instruction, and arrow up turn icon

route_overlay_signs.details: Speed limit sign '35' visible on route, 25 highway shield markers placed, 4 exit signs placed, 4 speed limit signs placed (console logs confirm)

blue_navigation_chevron.details: Blue navigation chevron user icon found with nav-chevron-fill gradient

settings_truck_profile_edit_modal.details: Edit modal opens with 'TRUCK HEIGHT' title, input field showing '13.5', CANCEL and SAVE buttons work correctly (regression test)

route_calculation.details: Route to Denver calculated: 545.9 mi, 7h 46m. Console shows route processing with 3950 coordinates

code_verification.zoom_indicator_component: MapControls.tsx lines 220-223: <div data-testid='zoom-level-indicator'> with currentZoom prop
code_verification.zoomend_listener: NavigationView.tsx line 686: map.on('zoomend', () => { setCurrentZoom(z); if (!isManeuverZoomActiveRef.current) userPreferredZoomRef.current = z; })
code_verification.auto_zoom_logic: NavigationView.tsx lines 2135-2161: Auto-zoom for upcoming maneuvers with thresholds 0.3mi/0.4mi for zoom in, 0.6mi for zoom back
code_verification.auto_zoom_reset: NavigationView.tsx line 2511: isManeuverZoomActiveRef.current = false in clearRoute

auto_zoom_implementation_notes.zoom_in_threshold: 0.3 miles (0.4 miles for complex maneuvers like exits, forks, turns, roundabouts, merges)
auto_zoom_implementation_notes.zoom_level_increase: +2 levels from user's preferred zoom (capped at 19)
auto_zoom_implementation_notes.user_preferred_zoom_tracking: Saved via zoomend event when not in auto-zoom mode
auto_zoom_implementation_notes.reset_on_route_clear: Auto-zoom state reset when route is cleared/cancelled
